name: Task detail shows content quality controls
description: With a seeded or previously created campaign that has at least one task, verify that opening a task exposes the draft content, quality checks, and review controls.

planSteps.description: Open the ReelMatrix web app and go to the Campaigns view.
Open the first campaign in the list, or use the campaign that is already active.
Verify that the Board tab is visible with at least one task card.
Open the first task card that has drafted content or is awaiting review.
Verify that the task detail panel opens and shows the task title, status, assignee, and drafted output or a clear task context.
Verify that quality indicators such as score, check badges, audit findings, or issue counts are visible when available.
Verify that review or improvement controls are visible, such as Approve, Apply AI improvement, Sync visual, Lock, or feedback controls.
